lessons.title: What is your name?
lessons.topic: Identity and the sounds of F and G

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What is the first thing you say when you meet a friend?
questions.hint: It's the word you use to start a conversation.

questions.question_text: Which word starts with the 'F' sound?
questions.hint: Think of something you like to be with.

questions.question_text: If you see someone you know, what can you say?
questions.hint: A short word for greeting a friend.

steps.title: Funny Goat
steps.text: Hello! My name is Anna. I am a girl. This is my goat. He is a funny goat. I have a fish too.

steps.explanation: Use 'This is my' to show what you have.

steps.audio_text: Hello! My name is Anna. This is my goat. He is funny and jumps around a lot.

steps.prompt: Say: My name is [Your Name] and I have a goat.
steps.expected_text: my name is [your name] and i have a goat

questions.question_text: My name is ___.
Which word starts with a 'G' sound? (Vocabulary question)
Complete the sentence: My name is ___.
True or False: A boy is a type of animal.
How does a fish move?

lessons.title: He and She
lessons.topic: Gender pronouns and the sound of H

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Who is the main character in the video?
questions.hint: Look at the clothes and haircut.

questions.question_text: What is the boy doing at the start of the video?
questions.hint: Think about what kids like to do with colorful blocks.

questions.question_text: Which word means a girl in the video?
questions.hint: It starts with the same letter as 'shoe'.

steps.title: The Park
steps.text: My name is Tom. He is Jack. He is my friend. She is Lily. She has a red hat. This is my favorite park.

steps.explanation: Use 'He' for boys and 'She' for girls.

steps.audio_text: This is Tom. He has a blue hat. He is playing with his friends.

questions.question: Is Tom playing with his friends?

questions.question_text: She ___ a girl. (Grammar question)
Which word is a gender pronoun? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Pink' is a color.
What does 'He is wearing a hat' mean? (Reading comprehension)
questions.correct_answer: He has a hat on his head.
options: He has a hat on his head

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: ___ is a boy.

lessons.title: Meet My Friend
lessons.topic: Introduction of others and sounds of I and J

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound do we hear at the start of 'ice cream'?
Which letter sounds like the beginning of 'jump'?
Which letter do we start with in the word 'iguana'?
questions.hint: It sounds like the start of 'ice cream'.

steps.title: Leo and the Jet
steps.text: This is my friend. His name is Leo. He is happy in an igloo! Look at the jet! It flies fast.

steps.explanation: Use 'He is my' to introduce a boy.

steps.audio_text: Hi, my name is Isla. This is my igloo. My friend Julia is coming over to play.

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Grammar question)
Which word starts with J? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: An igloo is a type of house.
This is my ___. (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you see in the sky that starts with 'S'?
questions.hint: It's bright and we see it during the day.

questions.question_text: Which creature loves to build webs and starts with 'S'?
questions.hint: It has eight legs and spins webs.

questions.question_text: Which food is green and shaped like a tree that starts with 'B'?
questions.hint: You can find it in a salad and it looks like a tiny tree.

steps.title: My Name is Ben
steps.text: Hello! My name is Ben. I am a boy. This is Lily. She is my friend. We see a frog and a cat.

questions.question: What do Ben and Lily see?

steps.audio_text: Hello! I am Jack. This is my friend, Grace. She loves jumping rope and playing outside.

questions.question: What does Grace love to do?

steps.prompt: Say: My name is Emma and this is my friend Jack.
steps.expected_text: my name is emma and this is my friend jack

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
This is my ___, and her name is Anna. (Comprehension question)
Fill in the blank: He ___ happy to see you.
